title: Full Orders Page Shell With Header Store Main Footer Main Ha C0bb72fd.Stories.Ts

versions.prompt: Build a full Orders page: shell with header "Store", main, footer. Main has page title "Orders", then a toolbar with a tertiary "Filter" button (opens a side drawer with filter options; drawer closed by default) and a primary "Export" button. Below: a data table with columns Order ID, Date, Total, Status and 5 sample rows in a scrollable wrapper. Use Shidoka layout and spacing rules.
versions.code:
